documentation.description:
The semantics of the arithmetic operations are those that apply to
a modular type with the same length as Address, i.e. they provide
twos complement wrap around arithmetic treating the address value
as an unsigned value, with no overflow checking.

subprograms.name: AddA
subprograms.code: function AddA (Left, Right : Address) return Address

subprograms.name: AndA
subprograms.code: function AndA (Left, Right : Address) return Address

subprograms.name: DivA
subprograms.code: function DivA (Left, Right : Address) return Address

subprograms.name: ModA
subprograms.code: function ModA (Left, Right : Address) return Address

subprograms.name: MulA
subprograms.code: function MulA (Left, Right : Address) return Address

subprograms.name: OrA
subprograms.code: function OrA  (Left, Right : Address) return Address

subprograms.name: SubA
subprograms.code: function SubA (Left, Right : Address) return Address
